methods.name: add_pythonpart_view_2d
methods.signature: add_pythonpart_view_2d( elements: ModelElement2D | ModelElement3D | Any, view_data: PythonPartViewData = PythonPartViewData(), )
methods.summary: Add the elements to a 2D view for the next PythonPart. Elements added to this view will be visible only in a ground view.
methods.remarks: Add the elements to a 2D view for the next PythonPart. Elements added to this view will be visible only in a ground view.

methods.name: add_pythonpart_view_2d3d
methods.signature: add_pythonpart_view_2d3d( elements: ModelElement2D | ModelElement3D | Any, view_data: PythonPartViewData = PythonPartViewData(), )

methods.remarks: Add the elements to a 2D3D view for the next PythonPart. Elements added to this view will be visible in both ground and isometric view.
